title: The Ulti Modpack Adventure
description: Would you like to adventure into a world of progressing difficulty with an entirely new way to progress in the game? If you answered yes to any of these question this pack is for you!
body:
In The Ulti Modpack Adventure you can travel the world in a changing of seasons, to discover an everchanging world that is unrecognizable!

In this modpack you are able to pick and choose a class type based on the skill tree provided! Will you become a daring wizard with the ability to decimate your foes with magic, or will you become a paladin who uses holy damage and passive damage over time effects to wreack havok on foes from beyond the grave? It's all  up to you in this pack that features not only scaling difficulty, but also an enhanced challenge system that rewards you based on how many times you complete bosses and such!
